questions.question: What is Performance Monitoring & Metrics and why is it important?
questions.answer: Performance Monitoring & Metrics is a fundamental concept that Lighthouse, Web Vitals, performance budgets, and monitoring tools. It's important because it forms the foundation for building robust and efficient applications. Understanding Performance Monitoring & Metrics allows developers to make better architectural decisions and write cleaner code.

questions.question: How do you apply Performance Monitoring & Metrics in a real project?
questions.answer: In practice, Performance Monitoring & Metrics is applied by following established patterns and best practices. Start with the simplest implementation, test thoroughly, and iterate. The key is to understand the underlying principles so you can adapt to different scenarios.

questions.question: What are common mistakes when working with Performance Monitoring & Metrics?
questions.answer: Common mistakes include: not understanding the fundamentals before applying advanced patterns, ignoring edge cases, not testing adequately, and over-engineering solutions. The best approach is to start simple and add complexity only when needed.

questions.question: How would you explain Performance Monitoring & Metrics to a beginner?
questions.answer: Performance Monitoring & Metrics is essentially about lighthouse, web vitals, performance budgets, and monitoring tools. Think of it as a building block — once you understand this concept, you can combine it with other concepts to build complex applications.
